about.title: About Green Light | Green Light Group
about.subtitle: Green Light Group — a leading Egyptian import, export, and logistics company since 1996
about.missionText:
Green Light Group is one of Egypt's leading companies in import, export, and logistics services. Founded in 1996, we have built a strong record of trust and success by delivering integrated trade solutions for companies, factories, and traders in Egypt and abroad.

We rely on a specialized team with more than 30 years of experience, enabling us to deliver professional services to the highest quality standards while offering competitive pricing.

Our services include:
• Import and export
• Customs clearance
• Shipping and logistics services
• Supply chain management
• Banking and commercial consulting through a dedicated department working with all banks in Egypt

At Green Light, we believe our clients' success is the foundation of our success. We are committed to reliable, fast service and long-term partnerships built on professionalism, transparency, and trust.
about.visionText:
For more than 30 years, Green Light Group has earned client trust through credibility, transparency, speed of execution, and integrated solutions tailored to each client.

We work with major factories, companies, and traders, building long-term relationships based on trust and professionalism, with high-quality services, competitive prices, and close follow-up of all trade and logistics operations.

Our clients' trust is the greatest proof of our success and our ongoing motivation to develop our services and provide the best support and consulting to ensure their business success.
about.internationalTradeText:
Green Light Group provides integrated international trade solutions that help companies, factories, and traders execute import and export operations efficiently and safely — from assessing client needs to final delivery.

We source the best suppliers and global markets, manage contracting and purchasing, and follow up on shipping and customs clearance, with commercial and banking consulting to ensure operations meet international standards at the lowest possible cost.

We are committed to professional services based on experience, transparency, and speed — facilitating international trade for our clients, reducing risk, and delivering the best value for their business.

industries.fallback3Desc: Melamine powder, urea formaldehyde powder, bakelite powder (compression and injection), caustic soda, all types of detergents, and liquid or powder industrial compounds.
industries.fallback4Desc: Import and supply of Chinese auto spare parts with high quality and competitive prices.
industries.fallback5Desc: Supply of lighting parts and equipment for projects, factories, and traders.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about Green Light
faqs.item1Question: What services does Green Light provide?
faqs.item1Answer: At Green Light we provide all the services you need to manage international trade efficiently — from sourcing raw materials and machinery from the best global suppliers, serving cookware and food factories, through international shipping, customs clearance, logistics, shipment tracking, and commercial and banking consulting.
faqs.item2Question: How long has Green Light been in business?
faqs.item2Answer: Green Light is a simple partnership company founded in 1996, with extensive experience executing work with precision and full adherence to quality standards.
faqs.item3Question: How do I request a quote?
faqs.item3Answer: Fill out the quote request form on our website, contact us on WhatsApp at 01000307992, or email info@greenlight-eg.com.
faqs.item4Question: Do you handle customs clearance and shipping?
faqs.item4Answer: Yes. We provide integrated logistics including sea and land freight, customs clearance, warehousing, and delivery to your warehouse or doorstep via Egypt's ports.
faqs.item5Question: Do you import raw materials for factories?
faqs.item5Answer: Yes. We specialize in importing production inputs and industrial raw materials for factories from trusted global suppliers, with full shipment tracking until delivery.
faqs.item6Answer: Yes. We offer planning, engineering design, and turnkey construction of detergent plants — from feasibility studies through execution and commissioning.
faqs.item7Answer: Our office is in New Damietta. Call us at 01000307992 or 01203004406.

quote.title: Request a Customs Clearance Quote for Your Shipment
quote.subtitle: Tell us about your shipment — cargo type, origin port, and destination — and we'll send a tailored quote for customs clearance, import, and export.
